overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest at night, navigating around a large tree trunk. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring low moonlight illumination and dense vegetation. The character briefly touches the tree while passing before continuing down a narrow dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, moonlit forest as the camera navigates around a massive obstacle to reveal a narrow trail. It begins with a slow walk through dense vegetation, where a large tree trunk dominates the left foreground and obscures the path ahead. As the camera moves forward, the character briefly reaches out to touch the rough bark of the tree before passing it entirely. The scene then opens up as the trunk exits the frame, shifting the perspective from a confined space to a clearer view of the dirt path stretching forward. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression deeper into the woodland, flanked by towering trees under a dim, filtered canopy.
